briefdescription.para: This function prints the given data on the console.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to any given data buffer

briefdescription.para: This function explains how to use HW PCR client APIs.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the OCP client instance

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS Upon Success ErrorCode Upon Failure

briefdescription.para: This function explains how to use SW PCR client APIs.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the OCP client instance

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS Upon Success ErrorCode Upon Failure

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the OCP function to generate response to DME challenge request.

detaileddescription.para: Main function to call the OCP functions to extend and get PCR for requesting ROM services.
